description: Generic linguistic markers for QUALITATIVE material business/operational impact — the way senior stakeholders describe consequence without a number ('hundreds of specialists unable to work efficiently', 'a deadline becoming harder to meet', 'material business risk', 'client delivery'). Used ONLY as a boolean signal that enables the discovery-momentum verdict rescue (pain + accepted next step must not be silently suppressed as NOISE). It deliberately does NOT flow into the numeric opportunity score or the `quantified_impact` field, which stay numeric-only — qualitative impact must never masquerade as a quantified figure. Logic lives in src/lib/signal-agent/intentExtraction.ts (detectQualitativeImpact); this file supplies only the lexicon and is editable without code changes. Nothing here references a company, product, speaker, or a specific transcript.
